description_long: This is a large, stately residential house surrounded by a perimeter wall and featuring a spacious front courtyard with a rectangular reflecting pool and landscaped paths. The house has a symmetrical facade with multiple gabled roofs, brick exterior walls, and numerous evenly spaced windows. The main entrance is grand, flanked by two projecting wings and accessed via a central walkway. The rear of the house opens onto a large patio area, with additional outdoor amenities including a pool and seating areas. The property is enclosed by a low wall, providing both privacy and a sense of exclusivity. The overall design suggests a blend of traditional and modern elements, with a focus on symmetry, outdoor living, and luxury.
description: A grand, symmetrical brick house with multiple gabled roofs, a central courtyard, and extensive outdoor amenities including a pool and patio, all enclosed by a perimeter wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical wings, central walkway, and reflecting pool in the courtyard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, gabled rooflines, and the perimeter wall enclosing the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large patio, multiple glass doors, and access to the backyard amenities including the pool.
description_view_3: Opposite side view revealing additional outdoor seating areas, the pool, and the architectural depth of the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Grand central entry with double doors, flanked by columns and accessed via a wide walkway, featuring a modest overhang and decorative landscaping.
